cards.title: 02 Structure the answer
cards.body: Use direct answers, tables, FAQs, and helpful sections that match real traveler questions.

cards.title: 03 Match action to question
cards.body: If a traveler asks about wellness, events, family stays, or location, the next step should open the matching offer or inquiry route.

items.question: What is AEO for hotels?
items.answer: AEO is the discipline of making hotel content easy for answer engines to extract, explain, trust, and connect to action.

items.question: Does schema guarantee visibility?
items.answer: No. Schema helps systems understand content, but it must sit on top of useful visible pages.

items.question: Where should I go next?
items.answer: Read AI discovery for hotels and hotel content for answer engines.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
